title: GitHub - kolega-ai/kolega-code
excerpt: Contribute to kolega-ai/kolega-code development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
Multi-agent coding in the terminal.

Kolega Code is a local-first terminal coding agent built for work that is too wide for one loop: fan out specialized sub-agents with Gigacode, route different models to different jobs, search the web, drive a browser, and keep sessions, settings, permissions, and credentials on your machine.

Built for work one agent cannot cover

Most terminal agents are strongest when one model can reason through one task at a time. Kolega Code keeps that familiar workflow, then adds orchestration for broad work: large audits, sweeping migrations, cross-file checks, adversarial reviews, and implementation plans whose pieces can run independently.

With Gigacode, Kolega Code can:

  • Fan out many sub-agents at once. Split a wide codebase review by package, assign independent implementation tasks, or run checks across many directories in parallel.
  • Use real workflow shapes. The agent can generate parallel phases, pipelines, loops, judge panels, and synthesis steps instead of only delegating one task at a time.
  • Keep orchestration visible. Workflow phase headers and progress lines appear in the transcript; the sub-agent inspector shows each agent's live trajectory.
  • Save inspectable artifacts. Each run keeps the generated workflow script, result files, a Markdown transcript, raw JSONL, a resume journal, and debug sub-agent transcripts under Kolega Code's state directory.
  • Run in either mode. In Plan mode, workflow sub-agents stay read-only for parallel investigation. In Build mode, they can use the full coding toolset.
  • Resume interrupted runs. Finished workflow steps are journaled so a deliberate resume does not have to restart the whole fan-out.

Use normal chat for focused changes. Turn on Gigacode when the problem is broad enough that one serial agent pass would be the bottleneck.

Features

  • Gigacode orchestration: parallel, pipelined, looped, judged, and synthesized multi-agent workflows with saved artifacts and resume support.
  • Specialized sub-agents: planning, building/coder, investigation, general, and browser agents, with live activity tracking in the TUI.
  • Repo tools: read and search code, create files, apply precise edits, and inspect session changes/diffs.
  • Terminal execution: run shell commands with streamed output and project-level permission controls.
  • Plan/build workflow: use read-only Plan mode for investigation and a reviewable task list, then Build mode to implement.
  • Web search and browsing: DuckDuckGo works by default with no key; Firecrawl, Tavily, and SearXNG are configurable search backends. Kolega Code can also fetch URLs directly and use a Playwright-powered browser agent for interactive sites.
  • MCP servers: connect verified streamable_http, sse, and stdio MCP servers (including OAuth-enabled HTTP servers) as permission-gated tools.
  • Model routing: choose provider/model combinations, set thinking effort, split long-context/fast/thinking roles, and override models per agent role.
  • Interactive or scriptable: use the Textual TUI, queue follow-up prompts while the agent is working, run kolega-code ask, request JSON output, list/export/resume sessions, and diagnose setup with doctor.
  • Extensibility: add agent skills, override prompts with project templates, run lifecycle hooks, and persist project permission rules.
  • Local-first state: sessions, settings, permissions, OAuth tokens, and API-key settings stay on your machine with restrictive permissions where applicable.

Quick start

1. Install with the script:

curl -fsSL https://kolega.dev/install-kolega-code.sh | sh

Or with uv (or pip):

uv tool install kolega-code
# or: pip install kolega-code

Verify the install:

kolega-code --version

2. Start a session in your project:

kolega-code .

3. Connect a model. Complete the first-run wizard with ChatGPT sign-in or an API key. Later, open the categorized Settings screen from the sidebar or with /settings. Use Shift+Tab to switch between Plan and Build mode, or run /gigacode on when a task is broad enough for fan-out.

Resume a previous conversation:

kolega-code . --resume            # latest session
kolega-code . --resume <id>       # a specific Resume ID from `sessions list`

Two ways to use it

Mode Command Best for
Interactive TUI kolega-code . Day-to-day development, exploration, orchestration
One-shot kolega-code ask "…" Scripting, automation, quick questions, CI

There are also helper commands for managing sessions and checking your setup:

kolega-code ask "summarize this repository" --project .
kolega-code sessions list --project .
kolega-code doctor --project .

Supported providers

Kolega Code supports a broad model-provider catalog and lets you route models by role instead of forcing one model to do every job.

Supported model providers:

  • Anthropic
  • OpenAI API
  • OpenAI via ChatGPT subscription sign-in
  • Google
  • Groq
  • Together.ai
  • Fireworks.ai
  • xAI / Grok
  • DashScope / Qwen
  • Moonshot / Kimi
  • DeepSeek
  • Z.AI / GLM Coding Plan
  • Kimi Coding Plan
  • Ollama Cloud
  • local Llama

Supported web-search backends:

  • DuckDuckGo — default, no key required
  • Firecrawl
  • Tavily
  • SearXNG — self-hosted option

See Providers & Models for model IDs, role configuration, API-key variables, and thinking-effort options.

Model routing

Kolega Code can assign different models to different operational roles: a strong long-context model for the main coding loop, a faster model for utility calls, and a dedicated model for extended thinking. You can also override models per agent role — planning, building, investigation, general, and browser — so wide workflows can use cheaper models where they fit and stronger models where they matter.

Sign in with ChatGPT

If you have a paid ChatGPT plan (Plus, Pro, or Business), you can use it to run OpenAI models instead of a separate API key. Run /login chatgpt in the TUI, complete the browser sign-in, and Kolega Code switches to the OpenAI (ChatGPT subscription) provider (default gpt-5.6-sol). Tokens are stored locally (chmod 600) and refreshed automatically; /logout chatgpt removes them. See Sign in with ChatGPT.

Configuration

Set your provider, model, and API keys from first-run onboarding or the full-screen Settings editor in the UI, or via environment variables and flags for non-interactive use:

export KOLEGA_CODE_PROVIDER=deepseek
export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=...
kolega-code ask "summarize this repository" --project . --provider deepseek --model deepseek-v4-pro

API key variables only provide credentials — pick a provider/model explicitly or save one in Settings. Local session state lives under your platform's state directory unless KOLEGA_CODE_STATE_DIR is set. See the Configuration docs for the full story.

The web_search tool uses DuckDuckGo by default without a key. To choose another backend, set it in Settings or export KOLEGA_CODE_WEB_SEARCH_BACKEND as firecrawl, tavily, or searxng; use FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY, or SEARXNG_BASE_URL as needed.

Projects can override Kolega Code's base prompts with uppercase Markdown templates in .kolega/prompts/. Generate editable starters with Jinja replacement tags using /prompts dump in the TUI or kolega-code prompts dump --project . in a terminal. To dump only selected starters, pass prompt names such as coder, planning, or compaction (filename aliases like CODER.md work too). Validate existing overrides with /prompts validate or kolega-code prompts validate --project ..

Requirements

  • Python 3.11+
  • An API key, ChatGPT sign-in, or local model for at least one supported model provider
  • A terminal that supports a modern TUI (most do)

Documentation

Full documentation lives at kolega-ai.github.io/kolega-code:

  • Quick Start
  • CLI overview
  • How it works & concepts
  • Configuration

Project resources

  • Documentation
  • Releases
  • Changelog
  • Contributing
  • Security policy
  • Issue tracker

Contributing

Contributions are welcome. See CONTRIBUTING.md for local setup, running the test suite, and building the docs site. Please report security issues privately per SECURITY.md.

License

Released under the Apache License 2.0.

sentences.zh: 终端中的多代理编码。

blocks.html_en: Kolega Code is a local-first terminal coding agent built for work that is too wide for one loop: fan out specialized sub-agents with Gigacode, route different models to different jobs, search the web, drive a browser, and keep sessions, settings, permissions, and credentials on your machine.

sentences.en: Kolega Code is a local-first terminal coding agent built for work that is too wide for one loop: fan out specialized sub-agents with Gigacode, route different models to different jobs, search the web, drive a browser, and keep sessions, settings, permissions, and credentials on your machine.
sentences.zh: Kolega Code 是一款本地优先的终端编码代理，专为对于一个循环来说太宽的工作而构建：使用 Gigacode 扇出专门的子代理，将不同的模型路由到不同的作业，搜索网络，驱动浏览器，并在计算机上保留会话、设置、权限和凭据。

blocks.html_en: Built for work one agent cannot cover

sentences.en: Built for work one agent cannot cover
sentences.zh: 专为一名代理人无法胜任的工作而打造

blocks.html_en: Most terminal agents are strongest when one model can reason through one task at a time. Kolega Code keeps that familiar workflow, then adds orchestration for broad work: large audits, sweeping migrations, cross-file checks, adversarial reviews, and implementation plans whose pieces can run independently.

sentences.en: Most terminal agents are strongest when one model can reason through one task at a time.
sentences.zh: 当一个模型可以一次推理一项任务时，大多数终端代理都是最强的。

sentences.en: Kolega Code keeps that familiar workflow, then adds orchestration for broad work: large audits, sweeping migrations, cross-file checks, adversarial reviews, and implementation plans whose pieces can run independently.
sentences.zh: Kolega Code 保留了熟悉的工作流程，然后为广泛的工作添加了编排：大型审计、全面迁移、跨文件检查、对抗性审查以及各个部分可以独立运行的实施计划。
借助 Gigacode，Kolega Code 可以：

blocks.html_en: • Fan out many sub-agents at once. Split a wide codebase review by package, assign independent implementation tasks, or run checks across many directories in parallel.

sentences.en: Fan out many sub-agents at once.
sentences.zh: 一次分散出许多子代理。

sentences.en: Split a wide codebase review by package, assign independent implementation tasks, or run checks across many directories in parallel.
sentences.zh: 按包拆分广泛的代码库审查，分配独立的实施任务，或跨多个目录并行运行检查。

blocks.html_en: • Use real workflow shapes. The agent can generate parallel phases, pipelines, loops, judge panels, and synthesis steps instead of only delegating one task at a time.

sentences.zh: 使用真实的工作流程形状。

sentences.en: The agent can generate parallel phases, pipelines, loops, judge panels, and synthesis steps instead of only delegating one task at a time.
sentences.zh: 代理可以生成并行阶段、管道、循环、判断面板和综合步骤，而不是一次只委派一项任务。

blocks.html_en: • Keep orchestration visible. Workflow phase headers and progress lines appear in the transcript; the sub-agent inspector shows each agent's live trajectory.

sentences.zh: 保持编排可见。

sentences.en: Workflow phase headers and progress lines appear in the transcript; the sub-agent inspector shows each agent's live trajectory.
sentences.zh: 工作流程阶段标题和进度线出现在记录中；子代理检查器显示每个代理的实时轨迹。

blocks.html_en: • Save inspectable artifacts. Each run keeps the generated workflow script, result files, a Markdown transcript, raw JSONL, a resume journal, and debug sub-agent transcripts under Kolega Code's state directory.

sentences.zh: 保存可检查的工件。

sentences.en: Each run keeps the generated workflow script, result files, a Markdown transcript, raw JSONL, a resume journal, and debug sub-agent transcripts under Kolega Code's state directory.
sentences.zh: 每次运行都会在 Kolega Code 的状态目录下保留生成的工作流脚本、结果文件、Markdown 转录本、原始 JSONL、简历日志和调试子代理转录本。

blocks.html_en: • Run in either mode. In Plan mode, workflow sub-agents stay read-only for parallel investigation. In Build mode, they can use the full coding toolset.

sentences.zh: 在任一模式下运行。

sentences.en: In Plan mode, workflow sub-agents stay read-only for parallel investigation.
sentences.zh: 在计划模式下，工作流子代理保持只读状态以进行并行调查。

sentences.en: In Build mode, they can use the full coding toolset.
sentences.zh: 在构建模式下，他们可以使用完整的编码工具集。

blocks.html_en: • Resume interrupted runs. Finished workflow steps are journaled so a deliberate resume does not have to restart the whole fan-out.

sentences.zh: 恢复中断的运行。

sentences.en: Finished workflow steps are journaled so a deliberate resume does not have to restart the whole fan-out.
sentences.zh: 已完成的工作流程步骤会被记录下来，因此故意恢复不必重新启动整个扇出。

blocks.html_en: Use normal chat for focused changes. Turn on Gigacode when the problem is broad enough that one serial agent pass would be the bottleneck.

sentences.en: Use normal chat for focused changes.
sentences.zh: 使用普通聊天进行重点更改。

sentences.en: Turn on Gigacode when the problem is broad enough that one serial agent pass would be the bottleneck.
sentences.zh: 当问题足够广泛以至于一个串行代理通道将成为瓶颈时，请打开 Gigacode。
特征

blocks.html_en: • Gigacode orchestration: parallel, pipelined, looped, judged, and synthesized multi-agent workflows with saved artifacts and resume support.

sentences.en: Gigacode orchestration: parallel, pipelined, looped, judged, and synthesized multi-agent workflows with saved artifacts and resume support.
sentences.zh: Gigacode 编排：并行、流水线、循环、判断和合成多代理工作流程，具有保存的工件和恢复支持。

blocks.html_en: • Specialized sub-agents: planning, building/coder, investigation, general, and browser agents, with live activity tracking in the TUI.

sentences.en: Specialized sub-agents: planning, building/coder, investigation, general, and browser agents, with live activity tracking in the TUI.
sentences.zh: 专业子代理：规划、构建/编码、调查、一般和浏览器代理，并在 TUI 中进行实时活动跟踪。

blocks.html_en: • Repo tools: read and search code, create files, apply precise edits, and inspect session changes/diffs.

sentences.en: Repo tools: read and search code, create files, apply precise edits, and inspect session changes/diffs.
sentences.zh: 回购工具：读取和搜索代码、创建文件、应用精确编辑以及检查会话更改/差异。

blocks.html_en: • Terminal execution: run shell commands with streamed output and project-level permission controls.

sentences.en: Terminal execution: run shell commands with streamed output and project-level permission controls.
sentences.zh: 终端执行：运行带有流输出和项目级权限控制的 shell 命令。

blocks.html_en: • Plan/build workflow: use read-only Plan mode for investigation and a reviewable task list, then Build mode to implement.

sentences.en: Plan/build workflow: use read-only Plan mode for investigation and a reviewable task list, then Build mode to implement.
sentences.zh: 计划/构建工作流程：使用只读计划模式进行调查和可审查的任务列表，然后使用构建模式进行实施。

blocks.html_en: • Web search and browsing: DuckDuckGo works by default with no key; Firecrawl, Tavily, and SearXNG are configurable search backends. Kolega Code can also fetch URLs directly and use a Playwright-powered browser agent for interactive sites.

sentences.en: Web search and browsing: DuckDuckGo works by default with no key; Firecrawl, Tavily, and SearXNG are configurable search backends.
sentences.zh: 网页搜索和浏览：DuckDuckGo默认运行，无需按键； Firecrawl、Tavily 和 SearXNG 是可配置的搜索后端。

sentences.en: Kolega Code can also fetch URLs directly and use a Playwright-powered browser agent for interactive sites.
sentences.zh: Kolega Code 还可以直接获取 URL，并使用 Playwright 支持的浏览器代理来访问交互式站点。

blocks.html_en: • MCP servers: connect verified streamable_http, sse, and stdio MCP servers (including OAuth-enabled HTTP servers) as permission-gated tools.

sentences.en: MCP servers: connect verified streamable_http, sse, and stdio MCP servers (including OAuth-enabled HTTP servers) as permission-gated tools.
sentences.zh: MCP 服务器：连接经过验证的 Streamable_http、sse 和 stdio MCP 服务器（包括启用 OAuth 的 HTTP 服务器）作为权限控制工具。

blocks.html_en: • Model routing: choose provider/model combinations, set thinking effort, split long-context/fast/thinking roles, and override models per agent role.

sentences.en: Model routing: choose provider/model combinations, set thinking effort, split long-context/fast/thinking roles, and override models per agent role.
sentences.zh: 模型路由：选择提供者/模型组合、设定思考工作、分割长上下文/快速/思考角色，并覆盖每个代理角色的模型。

blocks.html_en: • Interactive or scriptable: use the Textual TUI, queue follow-up prompts while the agent is working, run kolega-code ask, request JSON output, list/export/resume sessions, and diagnose setup with doctor.

sentences.en: Interactive or scriptable: use the Textual TUI, queue follow-up prompts while the agent is working, run kolega-code ask, request JSON output, list/export/resume sessions, and diagnose setup with doctor.
sentences.zh: 交互式或可编写脚本：使用文本 TUI、在代理工作时排队后续提示、运行 kolega-code Ask、请求 JSON 输出、列出/导出/恢复会话以及与医生诊断设置。

blocks.html_en: • Extensibility: add agent skills, override prompts with project templates, run lifecycle hooks, and persist project permission rules.

sentences.en: Extensibility: add agent skills, override prompts with project templates, run lifecycle hooks, and persist project permission rules.
sentences.zh: 可扩展性：添加代理技能、使用项目模板覆盖提示、运行生命周期挂钩以及保留项目权限规则。

blocks.html_en: • Local-first state: sessions, settings, permissions, OAuth tokens, and API-key settings stay on your machine with restrictive permissions where applicable.

sentences.en: Local-first state: sessions, settings, permissions, OAuth tokens, and API-key settings stay on your machine with restrictive permissions where applicable.
sentences.zh: 本地优先状态：会话、设置、权限、OAuth 令牌和 API 密钥设置保留在您的计算机上，并在适用的情况下具有限制性权限。
快速启动

sentences.zh: 连接模型。

sentences.zh: 使用 ChatGPT 登录或 API 密钥完成首次运行向导。

sentences.en: Later, open the categorized Settings screen from the sidebar or with /settings.
sentences.zh: 稍后，从侧边栏或使用 /settings 打开分类设置屏幕。

sentences.en: Use Shift+Tab to switch between Plan and Build mode, or run /gigacode on when a task is broad enough for fan-out.
sentences.zh: 使用 Shift+Tab 在计划和构建模式之间切换，或者在任务足够广泛以进行扇出时运行 /gigacode。

blocks.html_en: There are also helper commands for managing sessions and checking your setup:

blocks.html_en: Kolega Code supports a broad model-provider catalog and lets you route models by role instead of forcing one model to do every job.

sentences.en: Kolega Code supports a broad model-provider catalog and lets you route models by role instead of forcing one model to do every job.

支持的模型提供商：
人择

xAI / 格罗克
登月/基米

Z.AI / GLM 编码计划
Kimi编码计划

本地通话

DuckDuckGo — 默认，无需密钥
火行
他们融化了

blocks.html_en: See Providers & Models for model IDs, role configuration, API-key variables, and thinking-effort options.

sentences.en: See Providers & Models for model IDs, role configuration, API-key variables, and thinking-effort options.
sentences.zh: 请参阅提供者和模型了解模型 ID、角色配置、API 密钥变量和思考工作选项。
模型路由

blocks.html_en: Kolega Code can assign different models to different operational roles: a strong long-context model for the main coding loop, a faster model for utility calls, and a dedicated model for extended thinking. You can also override models per agent role — planning, building, investigation, general, and browser — so wide workflows can use cheaper models where they fit and stronger models where they matter.

sentences.en: Kolega Code can assign different models to different operational roles: a strong long-context model for the main coding loop, a faster model for utility calls, and a dedicated model for extended thinking.
sentences.zh: Kolega Code 可以将不同的模型分配给不同的操作角色：用于主编码循环的强大长上下文模型、用于实用程序调用的更快模型以及用于扩展思维的专用模型。

sentences.en: You can also override models per agent role — planning, building, investigation, general, and browser — so wide workflows can use cheaper models where they fit and stronger models where they matter.
sentences.zh: 您还可以覆盖每个代理角色的模型（规划、构建、调查、一般和浏览器），因此广泛的工作流程可以在适合的地方使用更便宜的模型，在重要的地方使用更强大的模型。
使用 ChatGPT 登录

blocks.html_en: If you have a paid ChatGPT plan (Plus, Pro, or Business), you can use it to run OpenAI models instead of a separate API key. Run /login chatgpt in the TUI, complete the browser sign-in, and Kolega Code switches to the OpenAI (ChatGPT subscription) provider (default gpt-5.6-sol). Tokens are stored locally (chmod 600) and refreshed automatically; /logout chatgpt removes them. See Sign in with ChatGPT.

sentences.en: If you have a paid ChatGPT plan (Plus, Pro, or Business), you can use it to run OpenAI models instead of a separate API key.
sentences.zh: 如果您有付费 ChatGPT 计划（Plus、Pro 或 Business），则可以使用它来运行 OpenAI 模型，而不是单独的 API 密钥。

sentences.en: Run /login chatgpt in the TUI, complete the browser sign-in, and Kolega Code switches to the OpenAI (ChatGPT subscription) provider (default gpt-5.6-sol).
sentences.zh: 在 TUI 中运行 /login chatgpt，完成浏览器登录，Kolega Code 切换到 OpenAI（ChatGPT 订阅）提供商（默认 gpt-5.6-sol）。

sentences.en: Tokens are stored locally (chmod 600) and refreshed automatically; /logout chatgpt removes them.
sentences.zh: 令牌存储在本地（chmod 600）并自动刷新； /logout chatgpt 删除它们。
请参阅使用 ChatGPT 登录。
配置

blocks.html_en: Set your provider, model, and API keys from first-run onboarding or the full-screen Settings editor in the UI, or via environment variables and flags for non-interactive use:

sentences.en: Set your provider, model, and API keys from first-run onboarding or the full-screen Settings editor in the UI, or via environment variables and flags for non-interactive use:
sentences.zh: 从首次运行入门或 UI 中的全屏设置编辑器设置您的提供程序、模型和 API 密钥，或者通过环境变量和标志进行非交互式使用：

blocks.html_en: API key variables only provide credentials — pick a provider/model explicitly or save one in Settings. Local session state lives under your platform's state directory unless KOLEGA_CODE_STATE_DIR is set. See the Configuration docs for the full story.

sentences.en: API key variables only provide credentials — pick a provider/model explicitly or save one in Settings.
sentences.zh: API 密钥变量仅提供凭据 - 明确选择一个提供商/模型或在“设置”中保存一个。

sentences.en: Local session state lives under your platform's state directory unless KOLEGA_CODE_STATE_DIR is set.
sentences.zh: 除非设置了 KOLEGA_CODE_STATE_DIR，否则本地会话状态位于平台的状态目录下。

sentences.en: See the Configuration docs for the full story.
sentences.zh: 请参阅配置文档了解完整情况。

blocks.html_en: The web_search tool uses DuckDuckGo by default without a key. To choose another backend, set it in Settings or export KOLEGA_CODE_WEB_SEARCH_BACKEND as firecrawl, tavily, or searxng; use FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY, or SEARXNG_BASE_URL as needed.

sentences.en: The web_search tool uses DuckDuckGo by default without a key.
sentences.zh: web_search 工具默认使用 DuckDuckGo，无需密钥。

sentences.en: To choose another backend, set it in Settings or export KOLEGA_CODE_WEB_SEARCH_BACKEND as firecrawl, tavily, or searxng; use FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY, or SEARXNG_BASE_URL as needed.
sentences.zh: 要选择其他后端，请在“设置”中进行设置或将 KOLEGA_CODE_WEB_SEARCH_BACKEND 导出为 firecrawl、tavilly 或 searchxng；根据需要使用 FIRECRAWL_API_KEY、TAVILY_API_KEY 或 SEARXNG_BASE_URL。

blocks.html_en: Projects can override Kolega Code's base prompts with uppercase Markdown templates in .kolega/prompts/. Generate editable starters with Jinja replacement tags using /prompts dump in the TUI or kolega-code prompts dump --project . in a terminal. To dump only selected starters, pass prompt names such as coder, planning, or compaction (filename aliases like CODER.md work too). Validate existing overrides with /prompts validate or kolega-code prompts validate --project ..

sentences.en: Projects can override Kolega Code's base prompts with uppercase Markdown templates in .kolega/prompts/.
sentences.zh: 项目可以使用 .kolega/prompts/ 中的大写 Markdown 模板覆盖 Kolega Code 的基本提示。

sentences.en: Generate editable starters with Jinja replacement tags using /prompts dump in the TUI or kolega-code prompts dump --project .
sentences.zh: 使用 TUI 中的 /prompts dump 或 kolega-code 提示 dump --project 生成带有 Jinja 替换标签的可编辑启动器。
在终端中。

sentences.en: To dump only selected starters, pass prompt names such as coder, planning, or compaction (filename aliases like CODER.md work too).
sentences.zh: 要仅转储选定的启动器，请传递提示名称，例如编码器、规划或压缩（像 CODER.md 这样的文件名别名也可以）。

sentences.en: Validate existing overrides with /prompts validate or kolega-code prompts validate --project ..
sentences.zh: 使用 /prompts validate 或 kolega-code Promps validate --project 验证现有覆盖。

执照

content_html_zh:
终端中的多代理编码。

Kolega Code 是一款本地优先的终端编码代理，专为对于一个循环来说太宽的工作而构建：使用 Gigacode 扇出专门的子代理，将不同的模型路由到不同的作业，搜索网络，驱动浏览器，并在计算机上保留会话、设置、权限和凭据。

专为一名代理人无法胜任的工作而打造

当一个模型可以一次推理一项任务时，大多数终端代理都是最强的。 Kolega Code 保留了熟悉的工作流程，然后为广泛的工作添加了编排：大型审计、全面迁移、跨文件检查、对抗性审查以及各个部分可以独立运行的实施计划。

借助 Gigacode，Kolega Code 可以：

  • 一次分散出许多子代理。 按包拆分广泛的代码库审查，分配独立的实施任务，或跨多个目录并行运行检查。
  • 使用真实的工作流程形状。 代理可以生成并行阶段、管道、循环、判断面板和综合步骤，而不是一次只委派一项任务。
  • 保持编排可见。 工作流程阶段标题和进度线出现在记录中；子代理检查器显示每个代理的实时轨迹。
  • 保存可检查的工件。 每次运行都会在 Kolega Code 的状态目录下保留生成的工作流脚本、结果文件、Markdown 转录本、原始 JSONL、简历日志和调试子代理转录本。
  • 在任一模式下运行。 在计划模式下，工作流子代理保持只读状态以进行并行调查。 在构建模式下，他们可以使用完整的编码工具集。
  • 恢复中断的运行。 已完成的工作流程步骤会被记录下来，因此故意恢复不必重新启动整个扇出。

使用普通聊天进行重点更改。 当问题足够广泛以至于一个串行代理通道将成为瓶颈时，请打开 Gigacode。

特征

  • Gigacode 编排：并行、流水线、循环、判断和合成多代理工作流程，具有保存的工件和恢复支持。
  • 专业子代理：规划、构建/编码、调查、一般和浏览器代理，并在 TUI 中进行实时活动跟踪。
  • 回购工具：读取和搜索代码、创建文件、应用精确编辑以及检查会话更改/差异。
  • 终端执行：运行带有流输出和项目级权限控制的 shell 命令。
  • 计划/构建工作流程：使用只读计划模式进行调查和可审查的任务列表，然后使用构建模式进行实施。
  • 网页搜索和浏览：DuckDuckGo默认运行，无需按键； Firecrawl、Tavily 和 SearXNG 是可配置的搜索后端。 Kolega Code 还可以直接获取 URL，并使用 Playwright 支持的浏览器代理来访问交互式站点。
  • MCP 服务器：连接经过验证的 Streamable_http、sse 和 stdio MCP 服务器（包括启用 OAuth 的 HTTP 服务器）作为权限控制工具。
  • 模型路由：选择提供者/模型组合、设定思考工作、分割长上下文/快速/思考角色，并覆盖每个代理角色的模型。
  • 交互式或可编写脚本：使用文本 TUI、在代理工作时排队后续提示、运行 kolega-code Ask、请求 JSON 输出、列出/导出/恢复会话以及与医生诊断设置。
  • 可扩展性：添加代理技能、使用项目模板覆盖提示、运行生命周期挂钩以及保留项目权限规则。
  • 本地优先状态：会话、设置、权限、OAuth 令牌和 API 密钥设置保留在您的计算机上，并在适用的情况下具有限制性权限。

快速启动

1. 使用脚本安装：

curl -fsSL https://kolega.dev/install-kolega-code.sh | sh

或者使用 uv（或 pip）：

uv tool install kolega-code
# or: pip install kolega-code

验证安装：

kolega-code --version

2. 在您的项目中启动一个会话：

kolega-code .

3. 连接模型。 使用 ChatGPT 登录或 API 密钥完成首次运行向导。 稍后，从侧边栏或使用 /settings 打开分类设置屏幕。 使用 Shift+Tab 在计划和构建模式之间切换，或者在任务足够广泛以进行扇出时运行 /gigacode。

恢复之前的对话：

kolega-code . --resume            # latest session
kolega-code . --resume <id>       # a specific Resume ID from `sessions list`

两种使用方法

Mode 命令 最适合
交互式途易 同事代码。 日常开发、探索、编排
一击 同事代码询问“...” 脚本编写、自动化、快速提问、CI

还有用于管理会话和检查设置的帮助器命令：

kolega-code ask "summarize this repository" --project .
kolega-code sessions list --project .
kolega-code doctor --project .

支持的提供商

Kolega Code 支持广泛的模型提供者目录，并允许您按角色路由模型，而不是强制一个模型完成每项工作。

支持的模型提供商：

  • 人择
  • 开放人工智能API
  • 通过 ChatGPT 订阅登录 OpenAI
  • 谷歌
  • Groq
  • Together.ai
  • Fireworks.ai
  • xAI / 格罗克
  • DashScope / Qwen
  • 登月/基米
  • 深度搜索
  • Z.AI / GLM 编码计划
  • Kimi编码计划
  • 奥拉马云
  • 本地通话

支持的网络搜索后端：

  • DuckDuckGo — 默认，无需密钥
  • 火行
  • 他们融化了
  • SearXNG — 自托管选项

请参阅提供者和模型了解模型 ID、角色配置、API 密钥变量和思考工作选项。

模型路由

Kolega Code 可以将不同的模型分配给不同的操作角色：用于主编码循环的强大长上下文模型、用于实用程序调用的更快模型以及用于扩展思维的专用模型。 您还可以覆盖每个代理角色的模型（规划、构建、调查、一般和浏览器），因此广泛的工作流程可以在适合的地方使用更便宜的模型，在重要的地方使用更强大的模型。

使用 ChatGPT 登录

如果您有付费 ChatGPT 计划（Plus、Pro 或 Business），则可以使用它来运行 OpenAI 模型，而不是单独的 API 密钥。 在 TUI 中运行 /login chatgpt，完成浏览器登录，Kolega Code 切换到 OpenAI（ChatGPT 订阅）提供商（默认 gpt-5.6-sol）。 令牌存储在本地（chmod 600）并自动刷新； /logout chatgpt 删除它们。 请参阅使用 ChatGPT 登录。

配置

从首次运行入门或 UI 中的全屏设置编辑器设置您的提供程序、模型和 API 密钥，或者通过环境变量和标志进行非交互式使用：

export KOLEGA_CODE_PROVIDER=deepseek
export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=...
kolega-code ask "summarize this repository" --project . --provider deepseek --model deepseek-v4-pro

API 密钥变量仅提供凭据 - 明确选择一个提供商/模型或在“设置”中保存一个。 除非设置了 KOLEGA_CODE_STATE_DIR，否则本地会话状态位于平台的状态目录下。 请参阅配置文档了解完整情况。

web_search 工具默认使用 DuckDuckGo，无需密钥。 要选择其他后端，请在“设置”中进行设置或将 KOLEGA_CODE_WEB_SEARCH_BACKEND 导出为 firecrawl、tavilly 或 searchxng；根据需要使用 FIRECRAWL_API_KEY、TAVILY_API_KEY 或 SEARXNG_BASE_URL。

项目可以使用 .kolega/prompts/ 中的大写 Markdown 模板覆盖 Kolega Code 的基本提示。 使用 TUI 中的 /prompts dump 或 kolega-code 提示 dump --project 生成带有 Jinja 替换标签的可编辑启动器。 在终端中。 要仅转储选定的启动器，请传递提示名称，例如编码器、规划或压缩（像 CODER.md 这样的文件名别名也可以）。 使用 /prompts validate 或 kolega-code Promps validate --project 验证现有覆盖。

要求

  • Python 3.11+
  • 至少一个受支持模型提供商的 API 密钥、ChatGPT 登录或本地模型
  • 支持现代 TUI 的终端（大多数都支持）

文档

完整文档位于 kolega-ai.github.io/kolega-code：

  • 快速入门
  • CLI 概述
  • 它的工作原理和概念
  • 配置

项目资源

  • 文档
  • 发布
  • 变更日志
  • 贡献
  • 安全政策
  • 问题跟踪器

贡献

欢迎贡献。 请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md 了解本地设置、运行测试套件以及构建文档站点。 请根据 SECURITY.md 私下报告安全问题。

执照

根据 Apache 许可证 2.0 发布。
